title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart at the River Styx
original_title: 子連れ狼 三途の川の乳母車
overview: Ogami Itto battles a group of female ninja in the employ of the Yagyu clan and must eliminate a traitor who plans to sell his clan's secrets to the Shogunate.
